reviews.positive: very clean and had everything a family would need.
reviews.negative: no communication despite requesting it for how to get our key and find our caravan. so was rather stressful to arrive and then have to call a phone number on the reception to then have someone come and give us this information, was told this should have been texted to me but had received nothing since booking.

reviews.summary: Amazing stay in a lovely location
reviews.positive: Location was absolutely amazing. The views were just amazing
reviews.negative:
The shower unit in the bathroom was broken
We didn’t complain but had to adapt to get the height of the shower adjusted p

reviews.positive:
We had a wonderful 4 night stay. Friendly and helpful staff at reception. 
The lodge was clean and a lovely size. 
Would definitely stay again in this beautiful location.
Very clean and quiet. We had a view usually obliterated by the daily rain. We were very comfortable and would certainly go again.
reviews.negative: Living area could do with some side lights as the main lights were very bright. Not not really a problem but would make it easier on the eyes at night.
